channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Edge-First Revolution: Reclaiming Data Sovereignty in Cybersecurity
item.description: The Edge-First Revolution: Why Data Sovereignty Must Start at the Edge The traditional security model—backhauling all telemetry to a centralized cloud SIEM—is collapsing under its own weight. In...

item.title: Agent vocal IA sous 500 ms : l'architecture réelle STT LLM TTS
item.description: 500 ms. C'est le budget total entre l'instant où l'appelant se tait et le premier son de la réponse. Au-delà de 800 ms, l'oreille décroche : la conversation sonne robotique, l'appelant coupe la...

item.title: Sinch from the Command Line: Numbers, Calls, Messages, Logs
item.description: In my previous post on Sinch Functions, I kept reaching for the CLI to test things. At some point I realized I'd been treating @sinch/cli as a Functions tool when it actually covers the whole...

item.title: How to Detect Typekit (Adobe Fonts) on Any Website (2026)
item.description: Typekit has not officially existed since 2018, and yet it is still one of the most-detected font technologies on the web. That is because when Adobe rebranded the service to Adobe Fonts, the...

item.title: You Think You're Doing Localization. You're Actually Making Decisions for Your Users.
item.description: Yesterday afternoon, Peng showed wwwfate to his partner. The product had just been built: pet name generation. Upload a photo, pick a few options, and the AI gives you a set of names. He walked...

item.title: Enrich a CRM lead from nothing but a domain
item.description: A lead comes in with a company website and not much else. You need their tech stack to know if they're worth a demo, their Twitter and LinkedIn for the SDR to reference, and any public contact...

item.title: The leads were in the table. The automation never saw them.
item.description: There were two groups of leads sitting in contacted state. One group was getting follow-up emails, call tasks, the whole sequence. The other group was getting nothing — indefinitely. Same status....

item.title: What I track in a day
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life....

item.title: Why Your Multi-Agent AI System Keeps Getting Stuck in Infinite Loops (And How We Fixed It)
item.description: Autonomous AI agents love talking to each other until they get stuck in a cyclic feedback loop and drain your API budget in 10 minutes. Here is the deterministic orchestration pattern we use at...

item.title: How we solved 502 Read Timeouts on slow reasoning LLM APIs using SSE Stream Aggregation in Python
item.description: Hi everyone! Managing multiple LLM providers, rate limits, and API downtime while keeping latency and costs low became a hassle, so I built llmproxy. What it does: ⚡ Response Caching: Reduces...

item.title: The NuGet gap Shai-Hulud exposed — and what we built to close part of it)
item.description: In September 2025, security researchers disclosed Shai-Hulud: a self-propagating worm that spread through the npm ecosystem by stealing maintainer credentials and using them to publish malicious...

item.title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
item.description: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.

item.title: The Download: an organ transplant breakthrough, and homegrown Chinese chips
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Supercooled kidneys have been transplanted into pigs in a...

item.title: Whack-a-drone
item.description: In Pasadena, California, there's a cute red brick courtyard where one storefront isn't like the rest. The glass doors open onto a sparse industrial hallway, which leads to a sunlit foyer with a...

item.title: ChatGPT AgentForger Flaw Could Deploy Rogue Workspace Agents via a Phishing Link
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical vulnerability in OpenAI's ChatGPT Workspace Agents that could have allowed a single phishing link to stealthily build, authorize, and deploy an...

item.title: Bing Images Flaws Let Crafted SVGs Run Commands as SYSTEM on Microsoft's Servers
item.description: A crafted SVG submitted to Bing's image search ran commands as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM on Microsoft's production image-processing workers, and as root on the Linux machines in the same fleet. XBOW's...

item.title: TikTok’s protection of minors should not be opt-in, warns EU
item.description: TikTok has attracted the ire of the European Union over its protection of children who use the video sharing platform. The European Commission announced preliminary findings today under the...

item.title: Seeing AI Agents Is Not Enough. Security Teams Must Enforce What They Can Do
item.description: AI agent security is moving through a familiar maturity curve: adoption, then visibility, and finally, control. But what we've collectively discovered is that enforcing least privilege for AI...

item.title: Why AI Needs a “Genie Coefficient”
item.description: This essay was written with Barath Raghavan, and originally appeared in The Guardian. Major benchmarks measure what AI can do. None measure whether it does what you mean: the distance between what...

item.title: Facebook considers giving up and becoming TikTok
item.description: Facebook is planning some big changes to try and keep its users from jumping to rival social platforms like TikTok - changes that sound dubiously similar to becoming a TikTok clone. Facebook head...

item.title: Hacker Runs Hermes AI Agent Unattended for Post-Exploitation at Thai Finance Ministry
item.description: Someone installed a popular AI assistant on a rented server, switched off the setting that makes it ask permission before running risky commands, and pointed it at Thailand's Ministry of Finance,...

item.title: Golden Chickens Resurfaces With Four New Malware Families and Modular Implants
item.description: The threat actors behind the Golden Chickens malware-as-a-service (MaaS) ecosystem have resurfaced with four new malware families, indicating that the operators are showing no signs of stopping...

item.title: Some Kids Will Never Think AI Is Cool
item.description: “I think it should stand for artificial idiot,” one 9-year-old says. Here’s why kids of all ages are calling AI “disgusting” and “creepy.”

item.title: Microsoft pressures LG into killing unwanted McAfee ads
item.description: Microsoft has intervened to stop Windows 11 users with LG monitors from being bombarded with annoying McAfee trial pop-ups. In response to complaints about the LG bloatware, Microsoft's Windows...

item.title: NodeBB Patches Eight AI-Found Flaws Exposing Admin Access and Private Chats
item.description: Eight security flaws in NodeBB went public on Wednesday, along with the code to exploit them. Aikido Security rates all eight as high severity and says its AI pentest agents found them in a...

item.title: Kimi K3 Agents Found Redis Zero-Days and Built RCE Exploit, Researchers Say
item.description: Redis shipped seven security releases on July 23 after researchers published authenticated RCE PoCs for stock Redis 6.2.22, 7.4.9, 8.6.4, and 8.8.0. All four chains require RESTORE. The Streams...

item.title: Fake Notepad++ Plugin Delivers MATCHBOIL.V2 in UAC-0099 Attacks
item.description: The Computer Emergency Response Team of Ukraine (CERT-UA) has warned of a new campaign that involves the use of a malicious program that's dressed up as a Notepad++ plugin to compromise Windows...

item.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
item.description: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

item.title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
item.description: Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. With the update, which is currently in preview, Alexa Plus can link up...

item.title: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
item.description: Split between buying a smart calendar, a kitchen TV, a smart home hub, and a smart display? Amazon’s Echo Show 21 is all of those things in one, with a huge 21-inch screen. You can use it to...
